subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket over a warm knit sweater, a woolly hat, and snow trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the snowy street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears snow boots and mittens; the bright red jacket vivid against the white, hat and scarf added for the cold
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded winter jacket, knit hat, scarf, snow trousers, snow boots, mittens, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair, smooth youthful skin with cold-rosy cheeks
subjects.facial_features: Round face under a knit hat, light hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: A few snow-covered parked cars along the curbs of the snowy Scandinavian street
subjects.appearance_details: Sedans and a wagon under caps of fresh snow, only their dark lower panels showing through the white blanket
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A quiet Scandinavian residential street under a pale, overcast winter sky with light snow falling. Timber and rendered houses in muted reds and ochres line a two-lane road blanketed in packed snow; snow caps the roofs, low fences, and laden bare birches. Tire tracks cut through the snow where the center markings are hidden beneath it. A few snow-covered parked cars sit along the curbs; shovelled sidewalks run beside the homes. The flat white light casts essentially no shadows.

lighting.conditions: Overcast winter daylight with light falling snow
lighting.direction: Flat, diffuse light from the whole white sky, no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially shadowless; snow and sky scatter the light evenly
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright but flat, high-key white illumination; falling snow softens the distance while the child's red jacket pops vividly against the white

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Whites and pale greys of snow and sky, muted red-ochre houses, dark birch trunks, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Hushed, cold, calm snowy neighbourhood drive broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Tire tracks in packed snow, snow-laden bare birches, snow-capped parked cars and fences

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near snowy road and crossing child; falling snow softens the far background

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the snow-covered Scandinavian residential street.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the packed snow, decelerating as the nose dips slightly and tires crunch.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the road, partly covered by a thin dusting of snow yet still legible where tires have cleared it
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the snow-packed Scandinavian street under overcast snowfall, snow-capped parked cars on both sides.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed over packed snow
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking, tires crunching on snow as it decelerates.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips, snow crunch
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely through the falling snow.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary in the snow

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a snow-covered Scandinavian residential street under pale overcast, snow falling and snow-capped parked cars along the curbs. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, tires crunching on packed snow as it slows with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the falling snow while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Hushed snowy quiet with the muffled crunch of tires on packed snow, sound deadened by the snowfall, the low hum of the vehicle, then muffled firm brake and tire friction as it decelerates, settling into a soft idle with faint snow-muffled neighbourhood silence.
